query: What is the timeframe for sending it back for items bought during promotional events?
Can I switch my purchase for something else if it says 'Final Sale'?
expected_answer: No, these items are not eligible for return or exchange.

query: How long do flash sales typically last?
If I buy something during a sale and it goes cheaper later, how can I get my cash back?
expected_answer: Request a one-time price adjustment within 7 days for standard customers, or within 14 days for Premium members.

query: Are there any restrictions on how many discounted items I can buy?
expected_answer: Yes, Acmera reserves the right to limit quantities per customer.
